step_rationale: Cell adhesion, inflammation and fibrosis marker; independent MI risk factor.
mechanism: CDCP1 mediates leukocyte adhesion, vascular inflammation and fibrosis in atherosclerotic plaque instability.

references.title: Proteogenomic Analysis of Coronary Artery Calcification in Human Populations.
Proteomic profiling identifies novel independent relationships between inflammatory proteins and myocardial infarction.
Circulating virome and inflammatory proteome in patients with ST-elevation myocardial infarction and primary ventricular fibrillation.
